# Vendored Artifact Primitive Dependencies

## `mermaid.min.js`

- Package: `mermaid`
- Version: `10.9.3`
- Source: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@10.9.3/dist/mermaid.min.js`
- License: MIT

This is a pinned, pre-built browser bundle served locally by the workbench server
so artifact rendering does not depend on a runtime CDN request.
